transcription.text: Life is messy, but clean up doesn't have to be. Meet the Shark EveryMess, the only portable 3-in-1 tool that can dry back, wet back, and remove tough stains for every clean up. With two times more stain-grabbing suction, StainForce technology combines two ultra-concentrated formulas for 30 times more stain-fighting power. And when you're done, rinse-and-ready technology self-cleans in seconds. The Shark EveryMess, your 3-in-1 everyday solution for everything messy. StainForce.

And when you're done, rinse-and-ready technology self-cleans in seconds.
The Shark EveryMess, your 3-in-1 everyday solution for everything messy.
